units.lean_file_body:
open Matrix

open scoped BigOperators

variable {K : Type*} [CommRing K] {n : ℕ}

theorem det_of_triangular (A : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) K) (h : A.BlockTriangular id) : A.det = ∏ i : Fin n, A i i :=
  Matrix.det_of_upperTriangular h

theorem det_of_triangular' (A : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) K) (h : A.BlockTriangular (OrderDual.toDual : Fin n → (Fin n)ᵒᵈ)) : A.det = ∏ i : Fin n, A i i :=
  Matrix.det_of_lowerTriangular A h
notes: Fixed syntax error: added parentheses around `(Fin n)ᵒᵈ` to avoid ambiguous parsing as `Fin (nᵒᵈ)`. The two theorems use `Matrix.det_of_upperTriangular` and `Matrix.det_of_lowerTriangular` directly.
used_context: local file context: open Matrix, variable declarations
